generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotorControllerStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors state of cart stepper motor controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartMotorControllerStateDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistMotorControllerStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors state of hoist stepper motor controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistMotorControllerStateDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance CartMotorControllerStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorControllerStateSensor
]

instance HoistMotorControllerStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistMotorControllerStateSensor
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time swing angle measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time wind speed measurement data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CartMotorControllerStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "State data from cart stepper motor controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartMotorControllerStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance HoistMotorControllerStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "State data from hoist stepper motor controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistMotorControllerStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart movement actuator controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist movement actuator controlled by TMC4671-Eval motor controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for handling containers (pucks)"
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization for deploying digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDBDatabaseService, GrafanaVisualizationService, TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data logging"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDBDatabaseService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization tool for dashboard notifications"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance PythonGantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture description model for system design"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDBDatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database service for storing historical data"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance GrafanaVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes continuous validation and fault detection results in dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardNotificationForValidationBreaches, FaultDetectionResults
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic model for gantry crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryCommand
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates system behavior for validation and planning"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResults
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real-time measurements with simulations for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationResults
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults using time series classification techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionResults
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Manages MQTT communication for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmission
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of gantry crane system created in Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationService, SimulationService
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for optimal trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationService
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance ArcadiaModels : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Arcadia models for Model-Based Systems Engineering in Capella"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance DashboardNotificationForValidationBreaches : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard notification for continuous validation threshold breaches"
]

instance FaultDetectionResults : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection results for system maintenance"
]

instance ContinuousValidationResults : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
]

instance SimulationResults : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from simulation model execution"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from historical data logging"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to move cart and hoist along optimal trajectory"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataTransmission : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time data transmission via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ArduinoSensorInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino-based sensor interface for collecting data from sensors and motor controllers"
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoSensorInterface, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service executed by the Control Application through the Physical Crane Interface."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with data logging and validation performed at sensor sampling frequency (exact rate unspecified)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical crane connected via Python interface to Control Application and Logging Application; digital services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation) integrated via MQTT broker and Docker containerization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers as designed (CAD models), as manufactured (physical hardware), and as operated phases, with continuous validation during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements with simulation outputs using distance metrics against predefined thresholds for model validity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for communication between DT services; physical interface uses Python to interact with crane controllers via unspecified serial communication protocol."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer using Docker Compose to containerize database, MQTT broker, and Grafana dashboard; gantrylib module installed via pip."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Ad-hoc approach using C4 Model for architecture and Capella for Model-Based Systems Engineering; no industry standards explicitly followed."
]
